meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building in circles. Master user onboarding to escape tutorial hell using Antigravity and Claude Code. A high-impact guide for AI founders.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a symptom of building features instead of outcomes. To escape, implement a high-velocity user onboarding flow that forces value delivery within the first 60 seconds. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you shift from passive learning to revenue-generating product development.
content.intro:
You’ve watched the videos, read the documentation, and cloned the repositories, yet your production database remains empty. You are trapped in 'tutorial hell'—a cycle where the code works in the sandbox but fails to solve a real human problem. It’s a subtle trap that keeps founders busy while the market moves on without them.

The exit strategy isn't another tutorial; it's radical focus on user onboarding. When you prioritize the 'Aha!' moment over complex architecture, you stop building features and start building a business. Let’s break the cycle by shipping a high-conversion onboarding flow that proves your product's value before the user even signs up.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Hook
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves your product works. We will build a skeleton that gets the user to this action immediately, skipping unnecessary registration steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal onboarding flow structure that triggers a core value action after a single user input, focusing on high conversion and low friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a minimal React component for a 3-step value-first onboarding flow'

steps.title: Scaffold the State Machine
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a robust state machine that tracks onboarding progress, ensuring users don't get stuck in dead-end UI states.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a state machine for a 3-step onboarding flow using XState, including transitions for success and failure modes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the state machine logic in src/onboarding/machine.ts'

steps.title: Automate Data Persistence
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to a backend service to capture user intent early, even if they haven't created a full account yet.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a server-side API endpoint to store partial onboarding data linked to a temporary session ID.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a Supabase edge function to handle anonymous onboarding data persistence'

steps.title: Integrate Contextual Feedback
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject intelligent tooltips that guide users based on their specific inputs during the flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function that determines the next tooltip to show based on the current onboarding state and user input.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add contextual feedback logic to the onboarding components'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion
steps.description: Measure drop-off points in your onboarding and use Claude Code to iterate on the copy and design to improve throughput.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the onboarding flow for potential friction points and suggest UI improvements for a 20% conversion increase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor the CTA buttons to be more prominent based on conversion best practices'

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until the user has experienced the primary value proposition.
Use temporary local storage to persist state so refreshes don't kill the onboarding momentum.
A/B test your 'Aha!' moment; if users aren't reaching it in 60 seconds, the product is too complex.
Treat your onboarding flow as a product, not a feature; it is the most important part of your funnel.
Use Claude Code to write tests for your onboarding flow first to ensure zero-friction deployment.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run 5 user tests, and refine the path based on actual feedback data.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop building aimlessly and start capturing value. The difference between a hobby project and a SaaS business is the quality of your onboarding. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
